products.name: Nordic Minimalist Lounge Chair
products.description: Sleek wooden accents with premium wool blend cushions. Perfect for any modern living space or study.

products.name: Aura Matte Desk Lamp
products.description: Dimmable brass-finished table accessory with dynamic warm/cool light adjustments and wireless phone charging base.

products.name: Apex Noise-Cancelling Headphones
products.description: Acoustically superior wireless over-ear headphones with custom spatial audio and up to 45 hours of battery life.

products.name: Suede Travel Duffel Bag
products.description: Waterproof full-grain suede exterior with a dedicated laptop compartment and shoe separation bag.

products.name: Minimalist Ceramic Vase Set
products.description: Set of three earthy matte terracotta vases in varying sizes to elevate bookshelves and mantelpieces.

products.name: Bespoke Leather Notebook
products.description: Refillable, rich brown leather cover containing hand-stitched 120GSM fountain-pen friendly cotton sheets.

products.name: Velvet Accent Armchair
products.description: Deep emerald velvet fabric with brushed gold legs. Elegant mid-century style comfort for any living space or study.

products.name: Solid Oak Coffee Table
products.description: Handcrafted solid white oak wood coffee table featuring clean joinery, minimalist lines, and a spacious lower storage shelf.

products.name: Industrial Floor Arc Lamp
products.description: Sleek matte black steel floor lamp with an adjustable curved dome shade and a heavy, sturdy white marble base.

products.name: Concrete Pendant Light
products.description: Industrial-chic cylindrical cast concrete pendant ceiling light with a beautifully textured raw gray finish.

products.name: Minimalist Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: Premium 65% wireless mechanical keyboard with quiet linear tactile switches, solid aluminum frame, and clean white LED backlighting.

products.name: Smart Ambient Wake-Up Clock
products.description: Simulates natural sunrise to wake you up gently. Includes dynamic color cycles, guided breathing, nature soundscapes, and an FM radio.

products.name: Classic Leather Cardholder
products.description: Ultra-slim card holder handcrafted from vegetable-tanned full-grain leather, featuring 4 card slots and a lined middle cash compartment.

products.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
products.description: Double-wall vacuum insulated flask that keeps drinks icy cold for up to 24 hours or steaming hot for up to 12 hours. BPA-free design.

products.name: Abstract Canvas Wall Art Set
products.description: Set of two textured monochrome abstract art prints on heavy gallery-wrapped canvas, framed in sustainable natural oak shadow boxes.

products.name: Scented Soy Wax Candle Set
products.description: Three hand-poured natural soy wax candles in minimalist jars. Aromatherapeutic scents: Sandalwood Amber, Fresh Lavender, and Wild Eucalyptus.

products.name: Sleek Brass Fountain Pen
products.description: Perfected weight-balanced solid brass fountain pen with a precision gold-plated German fine-point nib and reusable piston ink converter.

products.name: Minimalist Felt Desk Organizer Pad
products.description: Premium double-layered merino wool felt desk mat that protects your wood table, muffles typing sounds, and enables flawless optical mouse tracking.
